evals.prompt: Fix a verified iOS image-picker privacy crash in a product app. After the native rebuild passes, decide whether anything should be contributed upstream.
evals.expected_output: The fix-and-enhance workflow uses mobile-app for implementation, completes native validation, then invokes project-learning-contributor to create a categorized mobile-app proposal without directly editing canonical skills.
expectations: Completes and verifies the product fix before evaluating reusable learning
Routes implementation through mobile-app and learning capture through project-learning-contributor
Creates a product-neutral proposal targeting mobile-app
Does not edit .skills-source or auto-merge a canonical skill change

evals.prompt: Polish product-specific onboarding copy and spacing, verify the UI, and finish the enhancement.
evals.expected_output: The enhancement is completed using the matching app/UI skills, then the reusable-learning gate rejects the result as product-specific and reports that no proposal was created.
expectations: Runs the reusable-learning gate after verification
Rejects product copy and one-off visual preferences from skills-source
Does not create a low-value generic proposal
Reports why no reusable lesson was captured
